title.en: The Lung of the Primeval Ether

description.ko: 생물 발광 수액과 섬세한 이끼 같은 막의 리듬감 있는 흐름에 초점을 맞춘, 숨 쉬는 생태계의 영적이고 유기적인 시각화입니다.
description.en: A spiritual and organic visualization of a breathing ecosystem, focusing on the rhythmic flow of bioluminescent sap and delicate moss-like membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Lung of the Primeval Ether.' A colossal, semi-permeable respiratory structure woven from translucent #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular membranes, floating in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent void. The entity rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap that flows like liquid silk through the darkness. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes, high-speed fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k, volumetric light shafts, capturing a divine organic flow and serene rhythmic atmosphere.
